rawContent: {"stage":"review-fix","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"A build stage that crashes with error_max_budget_usd produces zero source files; review-fix then has nothing to review and must FAIL with a clear no-code-found verdict.","scope":"pipeline stages"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Budget must be allocated sufficiently for at least one full implementation pass; a build that dies before creating any files leaves review with nothing actionable.","scope":"pipeline budgeting"}]}
